apprentice-wand.name: Apprentice Wand
apprentice-wand.description: A smooth yew wand etched with beginner runes.

runed-oak-staff.name: Runed Oak Staff
runed-oak-staff.description: A travel staff carved with patient woodland sigils.

ember-wand.name: Ember Wand
ember-wand.description: Its tip glows with a coal-red spark that never dies.

battlemage-rod.name: Battlemage Rod
battlemage-rod.description: A heavy focus built for spellcasters who stand their ground.

starfire-staff.name: Starfire Staff
starfire-staff.description: A polished ash staff crowned with a shard of fallen star.

witch-staff.name: Staff of the Fen Witch
witch-staff.description: Twisted wood pulsing with dark power.

ashwood-bow.name: Ashwood Bow
ashwood-bow.description: A light hunting bow cut from frontier ashwood.

yew-longbow.name: Yew Longbow
yew-longbow.description: A strong longbow that rewards patience, breath, and distance.

moonshot-bow.name: Moonshot Bow
moonshot-bow.description: A pale bowstring sings softly whenever moonlight touches its limbs.

militia-blade.name: Militia Blade
militia-blade.description: A serviceable sword carried by village levies and stubborn survivors.

knight-bastard-sword.name: Knight Bastard Sword
knight-bastard-sword.description: A two-handed noble blade equally suited to duels and battlefield chaos.

colossus-greatblade.name: Colossus Greatblade
colossus-greatblade.description: A massive blade forged to break monsters rather than men.

thief-stiletto.name: Thief Stiletto
thief-stiletto.description: A narrow dagger made for ribs, locks, and sudden exits.

shadow-daggers.name: Shadow Daggers
shadow-daggers.description: Matched blades meant to flash once and be remembered too late.

whisperknife.name: Whisperknife
whisperknife.description: A near-weightless blade that parts cloth and flesh with equal ease.

pilgrim-mace.name: Pilgrim Mace
pilgrim-mace.description: A humble iron mace blessed for the road and whatever walks it after dark.

sanctified-mace.name: Sanctified Mace
sanctified-mace.description: A silvered mace that rings like a bell when it strikes undead bone.

dawnbringer-crozier.name: Dawnbringer Crozier
dawnbringer-crozier.description: A radiant staff-mace whose golden head burns brightest before sunrise.

example-moon-blade.name: Example Moon Blade
example-moon-blade.description: Example content item for API-driven expansion.

warchiefs-cleaver.name: Warchief's Cleaver
warchiefs-cleaver.description: A brutal cleaver wrenched from the grip of a goblin warlord. The blade still hums with bloodlust.

ignavoths-fang.name: Ignavoth's Fang
ignavoths-fang.description: A tooth the size of a greatsword, torn from the maw of the ancient dragon Ignavoth. Radiates primal fury.

worldsplitter.name: Worldsplitter
worldsplitter.description: A greatsword so heavy it cracks the earth with each swing.

staff-of-eternity.name: Staff of Eternity
staff-of-eternity.description: An ancient staff that bends time around its wielder.

eclipse-daggers.name: Eclipse Daggers
eclipse-daggers.description: Twin daggers that cut through shadow and flesh equally.

godtouched-crozier.name: Godtouched Crozier
godtouched-crozier.description: A crozier blessed by a dying god. It hums with fading divinity.

stormbow.name: Stormbow
stormbow.description: A longbow strung with lightning. Arrows arrive before the sound.

frostforged-blade.name: Frostforged Blade
frostforged-blade.description: A sword tempered in permafrost. The edge never dulls.

glacial-staff.name: Glacial Staff
glacial-staff.description: A staff carved from ancient ice. Frost clings to its surface.

icicle-stiletto.name: Icicle Stiletto
icicle-stiletto.description: A dagger of crystallized cold. Shatters expectations, not blades.

frostpriests-censer.name: Frostpriest's Censer
frostpriests-censer.description: A holy implement of the frost priests. Radiates cold faith.

blizzard-bow.name: Blizzard Bow
blizzard-bow.description: A bow strung with frozen sinew. Arrows fly true even in storms.

aldrics-frostbrand.name: Aldric's Frostbrand
aldrics-frostbrand.description: Forged from the Frost King's own crown. Radiates ancient cold.

obsidian-cleaver.name: Obsidian Cleaver
obsidian-cleaver.description: A massive blade of volcanic glass. Brutally sharp.

infernal-staff.name: Infernal Staff
infernal-staff.description: A staff wreathed in perpetual hellfire.

ember-daggers.name: Ember Daggers
ember-daggers.description: Twin daggers that glow red-hot. They never cool.

ashpriest-mace.name: Ashpriest Mace
ashpriest-mace.description: A holy weapon forged in the caldera. Burns demons on contact.

caldera-longbow.name: Caldera Longbow
caldera-longbow.description: A bow of basalt-hardened wood. Arrows ignite in flight.

ignavus-flamebrand.name: Ignavus's Flamebrand
ignavus-flamebrand.description: Forged from a shard of the Undying Flame itself.

void-edge.name: Void Edge
void-edge.description: A blade forged from crystallized void. It cuts through reality.

entropy-staff.name: Entropy Staff
entropy-staff.description: A staff of decayed timelines. Its magic accelerates entropy.

thought-blade.name: Thought Blade
thought-blade.description: A dagger forged from crystallized thought. It cuts what you think of.

reality-mace.name: Reality Mace
reality-mace.description: A mace that enforces reality. Excellent against void creatures.

abyss-bow.name: Abyss Bow
abyss-bow.description: A bow strung with void-thread. Arrows disappear mid-flight and reappear inside the target.
